heading: START YOUR PROJECT
intro: At Maati Interiors, we take on a limited number of projects to ensure each home is thoughtfully designed and fully realized. We are best suited for clients seeking a thoughtful, full-service design experience.
subIntro: Please share details about your project below. If it’s a strong fit, we’ll be in touch to schedule a consultation.
budgetNote: Our full-service projects typically require a significant investment to ensure a cohesive, high-quality result.

successMessage.heading: Thank you for reaching out.
successMessage.text: We review each inquiry carefully. If your project aligns, we’ll be in touch to schedule a consultation and discuss next steps.
